title: BG Nexus Metal Black Nickel, 20A 16AX Quadruple Switch, 2 Way
features: SLEEK AND SLIM QUADRUPLE LIGHT SWITCH: From BG Electrical, has softly rounded corners and gently curved rockers – combining quality with modern elegance
PART OF THE NEXUS METAL RANGE: The 4-gang light switch is designed to perform at 10AX inductive loads
CONVENIENTLY ANGLED IN-LINE COLOUR CODED CAPTIVE SCREW TERMINALS: With backed out captive screws, making it incredibly easy to install and to connect the wires
FIXED INTEGRATED PLASTIC GASKET TO PROTECT METAL EDGES FROM MOISTURE: With no visible plastic to be seen around the switches
BG ELECTRICAL IS PART OF LUCECO PLC: They guarantee against faulty materials and workmanship for 25 years – giving you total peace of mind
